channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: PM Modi Flags "Safety Of Seafarers" To Trump Days After Indian Sailor Deaths

media:content.media:description: The PM stressed that keeping the Strait of Hormuz open is vital to the global economy.

item.description: "Safety Of Seafarers Of Utmost Importance": PM Modi To Trump At G7
item.content:encoded: "Safety Of Seafarers Of Utmost Importance": PM Modi To Trump At G7

item.title: "New Momentum, New Energy In Ties": PM Modi's Top Quotes At Trump Meeting

media:content.media:description: PM Modi also underlined the importance of keeping key maritime trade routes open

item.description: PM Modi met US President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, with the two leaders discussing India-US ties, peace efforts in West Asia, and the safety of Indian sailors amid tensions around the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi met US President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, with the two leaders discussing India-US ties, peace efforts in West Asia, and the safety of Indian sailors amid tensions around the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: "Calm, Cool And A Total Killer": Trump's Big Praise For PM Modi At G7 Meet

media:content.media:description: In comments during the working lunch, Trump said that he is not as calm as PM Modi

item.description: "Unlike PM Modi, who's calm, cool and a total killer, I am not. Look at him," Trump said as the two leaders prepare for talks on the sidelines of the G7 Summit.
item.content:encoded: "Unlike PM Modi, who's calm, cool and a total killer, I am not. Look at him," Trump said as the two leaders prepare for talks on the sidelines of the G7 Summit.

item.title: Trump Halts Intelligence Chief Confirmation, Renews Vote Curb Demand

media:content.media:description: Trump last week picked Jay Clayton as his next director of national intelligence (DNI).

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday he had suspended a Senate hearing on his own nominee for intelligence chief, in a fresh effort to push Congress to back his bill on voting restrictions.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday he had suspended a Senate hearing on his own nominee for intelligence chief, in a fresh effort to push Congress to back his bill on voting restrictions.

item.title: Video: At G7 Summit, Trump Declares "I'm The Boss", Draws Laughter

media:content.media:description: Macron has invited Trump to dinner at the Palace of Versailles outside Paris

item.description: The G7 summit of world powers in France is being chaired by President Emmanuel Macron as host but on Wednesday his guest US President Donald Trump left no doubt over who he believed was in charge.
item.content:encoded: The G7 summit of world powers in France is being chaired by President Emmanuel Macron as host but on Wednesday his guest US President Donald Trump left no doubt over who he believed was in charge.

item.title: Starbucks To Shut 2,000 South Korea Stores For Half A Day After Promo Row
item.description: Coffee chain to hold 'historical awareness' training after backlash against marketing campaign that evoked 1980 military crackdown.
item.content:encoded: Coffee chain to hold 'historical awareness' training after backlash against marketing campaign that evoked 1980 military crackdown.

item.title: "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final

media:content.media:description: During the interaction, Trump stated that the US-Iran framework deal is "very strong"

item.description: Iran-US Peace Deal - "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final
item.content:encoded: Iran-US Peace Deal - "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final

item.title: After Bungee Tragedy, Another Brazilian Woman Dies In 100-Foot Fall While Hiking

media:content.media:description: The accident happened Sunday at Grutas do Spar in Marica.

item.description: A witness told local media that the guide lunged and tried to hold onto her by grabbing her arm, but nearly went over too.
item.content:encoded: A witness told local media that the guide lunged and tried to hold onto her by grabbing her arm, but nearly went over too.

item.title: $14-Million Clean-Up Fails As Algae Returns To White House Reflecting Pool

media:content.media:description: Department of Interior Spokesperson Katie Martin said the pool is now bwing properly maintained.

item.description: The objective was to repair the pool, improve its structure, and make the water look clean and visually striking, with a blue tone described as "American Flag Blue," but the pool turned bright green again.
item.content:encoded: The objective was to repair the pool, improve its structure, and make the water look clean and visually striking, with a blue tone described as "American Flag Blue," but the pool turned bright green again.

item.title: Israeli Envoy Claims Hamas Network Is Expanding Into Pakistan And Bangladesh

media:content.media:description: Israel has been monitoring Hamas activity in Pakistan and Bangladesh

item.description: Speaking on Pakistan's recent attempts to position itself as a bridge between the United States and Iran, Israeli Ambassador to India, Reuven Azar, said Israel does not trust Pakistan and views its diplomatic posture with caution.
item.content:encoded: Speaking on Pakistan's recent attempts to position itself as a bridge between the United States and Iran, Israeli Ambassador to India, Reuven Azar, said Israel does not trust Pakistan and views its diplomatic posture with caution.

item.title: Indian Man Opens Savings Account In UAE, Gets Rs 5-Crore Lucky Draw Win

media:content.media:description: Venga said the prize amount fulfilled his long-held dream.

item.description: The SIB launched the "Millionaire" campaign -- a savings-linked rewards programme-- in 2025 to encourage customers to build wealth through eligible deposit accounts.
item.content:encoded: The SIB launched the "Millionaire" campaign -- a savings-linked rewards programme-- in 2025 to encourage customers to build wealth through eligible deposit accounts.

item.title: Iran's Missiles Can Reach London, Delhi And US: Israel Minister To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Haskel said Israel took military action only in response to attacks by Iran or Hezbollah.

item.description: She warned that if Hezbollah launched attacks during the negotiations, Israel would respond.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1114091/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>She warned that if Hezbollah launched attacks during the negotiations, Israel would respond.

item.title: Deal Done, But Iran Can Still Restrict Access To Hormuz, Flags US Intel

media:content.media:description: Iran believes that it can continue to weaponise the Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: Sources familiar with the findings of US intelligence assessments noted that Iran now has the capability to effectively restrict or shut access to the Strait of Hormuz at will.
item.content:encoded: Sources familiar with the findings of US intelligence assessments noted that Iran now has the capability to effectively restrict or shut access to the Strait of Hormuz at will.

item.title: Why Iran Is Calling Its New US Agreement A Victory Despite Heavy Losses

media:content.media:description: Iran calls its latest deal with the US a victory, claiming it remains strong despite conflict losses

item.description: Tehran said it has come out stronger after the recent conflict, and even claimed that it has shown more confidence than before the war began on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Tehran said it has come out stronger after the recent conflict, and even claimed that it has shown more confidence than before the war began on February 28.

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein's Final 35 Days: Inside The Untold Story Behind His Death
item.description: Epstein had already been prosecuted once in Florida in 2008. In that earlier case, he received a controversial plea deal and served about 13 months in custody.
item.content:encoded: Epstein had already been prosecuted once in Florida in 2008. In that earlier case, he received a controversial plea deal and served about 13 months in custody.

item.title: Video: Plane Crashes On Texas Highway, Cockpit Window Broken For Rescue

media:content.media:description: People left their vehicles to frantically try to smash the cockpit window and free passengers inside.

item.description: Police say six people were onboard and one was killed. The plane crashed in Laredo shortly after 10 pm.
item.content:encoded: Police say six people were onboard and one was killed. The plane crashed in Laredo shortly after 10 pm.

item.title: Lawrence Bishnoi Gang Member Who Shot At AP Dhillon's Canada Home To Be Deported To India

media:content.media:description: Abjeet Kingra moved to Canada in 2018 on a study permit.

item.description: The Canadian Immigration and Refugee Board cleared the way for Abjeet Kingra's deportation - who is currently serving a six-year sentence and is also facing charges related to another attack.
item.content:encoded: The Canadian Immigration and Refugee Board cleared the way for Abjeet Kingra's deportation - who is currently serving a six-year sentence and is also facing charges related to another attack.

item.title: "We Are Always Ready": PM Modi As He Stands Beside Trump For G7 Summit Photo
item.description: Trump and Modi's meeting marks their first face-to-face interaction in around 16 months.
item.content:encoded: Trump and Modi's meeting marks their first face-to-face interaction in around 16 months.

item.title: 24-Year-Old Indian Techie Among 11 Skydivers Killed In Missouri Plane Crash

media:content.media:description: Datla was a technology professional based in the Kansas City

item.description: Sai Karthik Varma Datla had a master's degree in computer science from the University of Central Missouri and worked in the healthcare technology sector
item.content:encoded: Sai Karthik Varma Datla had a master's degree in computer science from the University of Central Missouri and worked in the healthcare technology sector

item.title: How $40 Million Gold Bar Theft Could Reveal CIA's Secret Operations

media:content.media:description: As investigators dug deeper, they allegedly uncovered something much bigger.

item.description: The unusual case has drawn comparisons to a 1970s burglary that exposed a major Cold War CIA mission.
item.content:encoded: The unusual case has drawn comparisons to a 1970s burglary that exposed a major Cold War CIA mission.
